title: Generate The Bing Bang Theory inspired image asset
acceptance_criteria: Generates an original image inspired by a geeky apartment hangout sitcom vibe without using actor likeness
No visible text, captions, logos, or watermarks
Writes the final image to assets/images/the-bing-bang-theory.png or a suffixed variant if that path already exists
Reports the final prompt used and the output file path
prompt: Create an original image inspired by a warm, geeky apartment hangout sitcom vibe for 'The Bing Bang Theory'. Show a cozy living room scene with science props, comic-book energy, laptops, whiteboards, and friends hanging out, but do not copy real actors or copyrighted character likenesses. Use a bright cinematic sitcom look, polished composition, high detail, no text, no watermark.
completion_summary: Generated an original PNG apartment hangout scene at assets/images/the-bing-bang-theory.png with no text or logos, using stylized non-identifiable characters and science/comic props.
